description_long: This object is a compact, circular bomb with a rugged, military-style design. Its body is primarily olive drab with a matte finish, showing signs of wear and scuff marks, suggesting it is built for durability in harsh environments. The bomb features a prominent, slightly domed black central cap on the top, surrounded by evenly spaced, reinforced vertical ridges that provide structural strength and possibly aid in handling or placement. A visible seam runs horizontally around the object's circumference, indicating a two-part construction, likely for assembly or maintenance. The overall form is squat and robust, with no visible buttons, wires, or digital displays, giving it a low-profile and tamper-resistant appearance. The design suggests it is intended for ground placement, possibly as an anti-vehicle or anti-personnel device in urban settings.
description: A rugged, circular olive drab bomb with a black domed cap and reinforced vertical ridges, showing wear and built for ground deployment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular shape, black domed cap, and vertical ridges evenly spaced around the olive drab body.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to view 0, highlighting the same features with minor changes in lighting and ridge alignment.
description_view_2: Similar to previous views, this angle emphasizes the horizontal seam and the rugged, worn surface texture.
description_view_3: This view shows the vertical ridges and seam clearly, with the black cap centered and the object's symmetry evident.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: The central black cap may function as a pressure or impact trigger, with no visible external switches or wires, suggesting a concealed or tamper-resistant detonation mechanism.
